title: Iraq - News, Schedule, Scores, Roster, and Stats - The Athletic
original_text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappe top the list of World Cup goalscorers.

Unstoppable, irrepressible but only 18th? Ranking every match at the 2026 World Cup

The 48-team tournament has had a major impact on players, coaches... and fans. So what do supporters of those teams knocked out think of it?

World Cup 2026 Hand-Printed Unisex T-Shirt Match 42 France vs. Iraq RARE

President Donald Trump was awarded the inaugural FIFA Peace Prize during the draw for the World Cup in December.

The biggest World Cup in history is in full flow, as are some of the biggest stars. So where do they rank in value according to the data?

Canada are into the last 16 but will the knockout round signal the end of the goal rush? Will Neymar make his mark?

A thousand players have appeared at the World Cup. Here are some of the best performers you might have missed

They are often laced with drama and the neutrals love them. But how does a soccer penalty shootout work?

Many different setups have been used by managers and teams in North America. The Athletic assesses those that have stood out

We could see some classic ties in the knockout stages now the last-32 is confirmed. Who could play who in our ideal lineup?

Who knows more about soccer? Us ‘experts’, you the subscribers, a child, a dog or an algorithm? Come join us to predict each World Cup game

The knockout bracket is complete. Who has the easier path? Plus, how beautiful can a 0-0 be, and is Just Fontaine milestone in danger?

Each nation has its own tunes for different moments - where we have the official FIFA list for each team, and it's an eclectic mix.

Of 48 nations at this World Cup, 28 managers classed as foreign — including two for Tunisia — have sat in the dugout. But what is it like?

A hat-trick for France's Ousmane Dembele, a new offer for Mauricio Pochettino and more.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
